overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a foggy abandoned urban street, entering a dark brick tunnel, and emerging into a park. The atmosphere is dense with fog and desaturated colors, with no other people or moving vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy abandoned residential street with derelict vehicles

events.description: approaching large brick tunnel entrance at end of street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the foggy abandoned street, passing derelict vehicles and vintage street lamps

entered.detail: tall weathered brick residential building with fire escapes
multi-story brick building with ornate balconies
derelict white sedan covered in dust and rust
rusted red sedan parked along the curb
ornate black cast iron street lamp post
utility wires stretching between buildings across the street
large brick archway marking the entrance to a pedestrian tunnel

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a fog-shrouded abandoned residential street lined with brick apartment buildings. Derelict cars sit parked along the asphalt road, and vintage street lamps emerge from the mist. Overhead power lines crisscross between the buildings as the character approaches a large brick tunnel entrance in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark brick underpass tunnel with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: entering dark tunnel from foggy street, visibility drops significantly
approaching bright exit light at the far end of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit brick tunnel toward the bright exit light at the far end

entered.detail: dark brick walls with white tile sections and spray paint graffiti
ornate black metal gate marking the tunnel exit
bright daylight streaming through the tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow brick tunnel, leaving the foggy street behind. The environment becomes dark and enclosed, with graffiti covering the tiled walls. The character walks toward a bright light at the far end where an ornate wrought iron gate marks the exit to the outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy park entrance with stone pathways and trees

events.description: exiting dark tunnel into foggy park area with trees
location text 'Rosewater Park' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: emerging from the tunnel into a foggy park with stone pathways and autumn trees

entered.detail: tall deciduous trees with sparse autumn foliage shrouded in heavy fog
wet cobblestone path leading deeper into the park
low weathered stone wall bordering the pathway

segments.scene_description: The character exits the tunnel through the wrought iron gate into Rosewater Park. The scene opens into a foggy natural environment with stone pathways, low stone railings, and tall trees with autumn foliage. The atmosphere remains misty and desolate as the character walks along the cobblestone path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate urban street through a dark passage and into a misty park. It begins by following a character through a fog-shrouded residential area lined with brick apartments, derelict cars, and crisscrossing power lines. As the character advances, the open street gives way to the enclosed darkness of a narrow brick tunnel where graffiti-covered walls lead toward a distant light. The scene then shifts as the character passes through an ornate wrought iron gate, emerging from the tunnel into the open air of Rosewater Park. Finally, the environment transforms into a natural landscape of cobblestone paths and autumn foliage, maintaining a desolate, misty atmosphere.
